2603.16942.title: UNICORN: Ultrasound Nakagami Imaging via Score Matching and Adaptation for Assessing Hepatic Steatosis
2603.16942.paper_summary: Ultrasound imaging is an essential first-line tool for assessing hepatic steatosis. While conventional B-mode ultrasound imaging has limitations in providing detailed tissue characterization, ultrasound Nakagami imaging holds promise for visualizing and quantifying tissue scattering in backscattered signals, with potential applications in fat fraction analysis. However, existing methods for Nakagami imaging struggle with optimal window size selection and suffer from estimator instability, leading to degraded image resolution. To address these challenges, we propose a novel method called UNICORN (Ultrasound Nakagami Imaging via Score Matching and Adaptation), which offers an accurate, closed-form estimator for Nakagami parameter estimation based on the score function of the ultrasound envelope signal. Unlike methods that visualize only specific regions of interest (ROI) and estimate parameters within fixed window sizes, our approach provides comprehensive parameter mapping by providing a pixel-by-pixel estimator, resulting in high-resolution imaging. We demonstrated that our proposed estimator effectively assesses hepatic steatosis and provides visual distinction in the backscattered statistics associated with this condition. Through extensive experiments using real envelope data from patient, we validated that UNICORN enables clinical detection of hepatic steatosis and exhibits robustness and generalizability.
2603.16942.paper_summary_zh: 超聲影像是評估肝臟脂肪變性的基本一線工具。雖然傳統的B模式超聲影像在提供詳細的組織特徵方面存在限制，但超聲Nakagami影像在可視化和量化回散射信號中的組織散射方面顯示出潛力，並有可能應用於脂肪分數分析。然而，現有的Nakagami影像方法在最佳窗口大小選擇上面臨挑戰，並且估計器不穩定，導致影像解析度下降。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了一種新方法，稱為UNICORN（通過分數匹配和適應的超聲Nakagami影像），該方法基於超聲包絡信號的分數函數提供準確的封閉形式估計器，用於Nakagami參數估計。與僅可視化特定感興趣區域（ROI）並在固定窗口大小內估計參數的方法不同，我們的方法通過提供逐像素估計器來提供全面的參數映射，從而實現高解析度影像。我們證明了我們提出的估計器有效評估肝臟脂肪變性，並在與此狀況相關的回散射統計中提供視覺區別。通過使用患者的真實包絡數據進行廣泛實驗，我們驗證了UNICORN能夠臨床檢測肝臟脂肪變性，並展現出穩健性和普遍適用性。
2603.16942.author: Kwanyoung Kim et.al.
2603.16942.authors: Kwanyoung Kim, Jaa-Yeon Lee, Youngjun Ko, GunWoo Lee, Jong Chul Ye
